grant_title: Massachusetts Life Sciences Center Awards Dana-Farber $2,811,397 for Center for Emergent Drug Targets
project_area: Drug discovery and development, specifically early-stage cancer therapeutics
demographic_requirements: None specified; open to researchers and institutions with relevant expertise
eligibility_summary: Open to academic and industry researchers in Massachusetts focused on early-stage drug discovery, particularly in cancer therapeutics. Priority given to projects leveraging the Center for Emergent Drug Targets' resources and technologies.
